data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add `validate` subcommand to the ticket CLI dispatcher that wraps validate-issues.sh logic.

**Why**: The ticket system should answer its own health questions. Walking-skeleton entry point for the epic.

**Scope**:
- IN: New `validate` case in `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket` dispatcher; new ticket-validate.sh (or in-process function in ticket-lib-api.sh) preserving full --quick/--full/--fix/--json/--terse flag surface and 5-tier exit code contract (0=OK,1=info,2=warn,3=important,4=critical); integration test using synthetic fixture exercising subcommand through dispatcher asserting each exit tier and both text/json modes
- OUT: Changing validate-issues.sh behavior; migrating callers (Epic e1b2-2653); removing validate-issues.sh

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `ticket validate` is callable via the dispatcher with the same --quick/--full/--fix/--json/--terse flag surface as validate-issues.sh
  <- Satisfies: "validate (health diagnostics with --quick/--full/--fix/--json/--terse flags and 5-tier scored exit codes 0-4)"
- When this story is complete, the integration test invokes `ticket validate` through the CLI dispatcher (not validate-issues.sh directly) and asserts that each exit tier (0-4) is returned correctly through the dispatcher chain
  <- Satisfies: "Each new subcommand has an integration test in tests/ exercising the subcommand through the ticket CLI dispatcher"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic in the validate subcommand implementation

## Considerations

- [Reliability] 5-tier exit code contract (0-4) must be preserved through dispatcher layer -- downstream callers branch on exit code
- [Testing] Dispatcher must not mask non-zero exits (exec/trap/||true can collapse 5-tier to 0/1) -- integration test MUST test through dispatcher
- [Maintainability] First story to add a case branch to dispatcher; S2-S7 depend on this landing first

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a developer, I can validate ticket health via ticket validate with the full flag surface and 5-tier exit codes
